_note: Content block for the /compare page (#605). Grounded in notes/competitive-positioning.md + notes/competitive-pricing.md (daemon-researched, Claude-verified against live sites 2026-06-23). Lift into the CMS later without changing the page component. coverage/values use: yes | no | partial.

hero.title: One rail, not four tools.
hero.subtitle: Wholesale platforms only sell. PLM tools only design. Provenance apps only verify. JYT runs the whole atelier — design to sale — on one system, built for independent houses, not enterprises.

lifecycle.title: Who covers what.
lifecycle.subtitle: No competitor spans design through sale. They each own a slice; JYT owns the rail.

pricing.title: No sales call required.
pricing.subtitle: Every wholesale and PLM rival hides pricing behind a sales call. Shopify is transparent — but sell-side only. JYT publishes atelier-friendly tiers for the whole rail.

rows.name: JOOR
rows.note: Tiers shown, every price is “Request Pricing”

differentiators.title: One rail, not four tools
differentiators.body: Design, produce, supply, and sell on a single system — no stitching a PLM to a wholesale platform to a storefront to a compliance app.

differentiators.title: Built for ateliers, not enterprises
differentiators.body: The wholesale and PLM incumbents are priced and built for global retail. JYT is for independent houses of 5–200 people.

differentiators.title: The maker network is the product
differentiators.body: 150+ vetted artisans across EU, India & Australia, with routing and coordination built in. No rival offers this.

differentiators.title: Passport built in, not bolted on
differentiators.body: EU ESPR-ready Digital Product Passport per SKU — native, not a separate subscription like standalone provenance tools.

cta.title: See it on your own pieces.
cta.body: Book a walkthrough and we’ll run one of your products from sketch to storefront — on one rail.
